category_functions.description_short: Returns whether all primary objectives have been completed.

category_functions.name: Objective_IncreaseCounter
category_functions.description_short: Increases the counter that is associated with this objective in the UI. You can provide an amount to increase by.

category_functions.name: Objective_SetCounter
category_functions.description_short: Sets a counter that is associated with this objective in the UI. You can provide a 'maximum' so that it shows up as "1 of 5"

category_functions.name: Objective_Manager_OnPlayerTurnEnd
category_functions.description_short: This is called at the end of a player turn
description_extended: This iterates over active objectives and executes actions
in the on_player_turn_end list

category_functions.name: Objective_IsActive
category_functions.description_short: Is the objective started and not finished or failed.

category_functions.name: Objective_AreSubObjectivesExpired
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether ALL or ANY sub-objectives of the given objective are expired

category_functions.name: Objective_Expire
category_functions.description_short: Expires an objective and removes it from the list (unless it is a sub-objective, in which case it is marked as expired but stays visible until the parent objective is finished)
description_extended: Automatically removes any elements added with Objective_AddUIElements(). The showTitle and playIntel flags let you control whether the titlecard and Intel_Expire event are played (default: true).

category_functions.name: Objective_StartTimer
category_functions.description_short: Starts a timer that is associated with this objective in the UI. Use COUNT_DOWN or COUNT_UP for the 'direction' parameter

category_functions.name: Objective_UpdateText
category_functions.description_short: Updates the title and description for the objective. If you only want to set one of them, pass in nil for the other
description_extended: Use the immediate flag to make this change happen immediately, bypassing the queue that objective updates normally sit in (i.e. you're updating the objective's title in the middle of its PreStart() function!)

category_functions.name: Objective_GetSubObjectives
category_functions.description_short: Returns a table of all sub-objectives of the given objective

category_functions.name: Objective_Stop
category_functions.description_short: Stops an objective that is in progress and puts it back into the waiting-to-start state

category_functions.name: Objective_AreSubObjectivesComplete
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether ALL or ANY sub-objectives of the given objective are complete

category_functions.name: Objective_RemovePing
category_functions.description_short: Removes a tactical map ping from an objective

category_functions.name: Objective_RemoveGroundReticule
category_functions.description_short: Removes an existing ground reticule by its ID

category_functions.name: Objective_RemoveProgressBar
category_functions.description_short: Remove a progress bar for this objective.

category_functions.name: Objective_Fail
category_functions.description_short: Fails an objective and removes it from the list (unless it is a sub-objective, in which case it is marked as failed but stays visible until the parent objective is finished)
description_extended: Automatically removes any elements added with Objective_AddUIElements(). The showTitle and playIntel flags let you control whether the titlecard and Intel_Fail event are played (default: true).

category_functions.name: Objective_IsVisible
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether an objective is visible or not.

category_functions.name: Objective_SetProgressBar
category_functions.description_short: Show a progress bar for this objective with the given value (which should be a percentage from 0.0 (empty) to 1.0 (full)). This bar can be removed with Objective_RemoveProgressBar or by completing or failing the mission.
description_extended: If you want to use one of the "global" progress bars (if your project supports them), supply the relevant barIndex value and text string to show alongside it.

category_functions.name: Objective_StopCounter
category_functions.description_short: Stops the objective's counter. If a counter has not been set, it does nothing.

category_functions.name: Objective_AddGroundReticule
category_functions.description_short: Adds a visual splat on the ground in the world around a certain position, returning the ID
description_extended: The reticule blueprint (the circle on the ground) and the hintpoint template (the arrow) are by defualt taken from the objective type, but you can override them or set them to false to turn that element off.

category_functions.name: Objective_RemoveHealthBar
category_functions.description_short: Removes a health bar monitor

category_functions.name: Objective_AreSubObjectivesFailed
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether ALL or ANY sub-objectives of the given objective are failed

category_functions.name: Audio_OnMatchStateChanged
category_functions.description_short: Called via Core_CallDelegateFunctions("OnMatchStateChanged") signalling the player is close(r) to defeat.

category_functions.name: Audio_OnMaxTicketsChanged
category_functions.description_short: Called via Core_CallDelegateFunctions("OnMaxTicketsChanged") signalling the max ticket count has changed.

category_functions.name: Audio_OnInit
category_functions.description_short: Called by OnInit() in core.scar.

category_functions.name: Audio_OnTicketsChanged
category_functions.description_short: Called via Core_CallDelegateFunctions("OnTicketsChanged") signalling the ticket count has changed.

category_functions.name: Audio_Start
category_functions.description_short: Called by core.scar after opening cinematics and events are complete.

category_functions.name: Audio_UpdateHealth
category_functions.description_short: Checks health of entities/squads identified by Audio_TrackHealth() and queues associated music change.

category_functions.name: Audio_AfterActionReport
category_functions.description_short: Sends appropriate Victory or Defeat Wwise music event on campaign exclusive After Action Report screen
description_extended: Called via function inside metamp_rtslibrary.scar that fires upon After Action Report screen, this function handles victory and defeat music for all campaign missions.

category_functions.name: Audio_Update
category_functions.description_short: Rule that changes music level (if there's a change queued).

category_functions.name: Audio_TrackHealth
category_functions.description_short: Used to associate the in-game music with the health of one or more squads/entities (e.g. for annihilation win condition).

parameters.arg_name: items - Table of entities/squads/entity IDs/squad IDs whose health to track
if each team had two squads/entities of import).

category_functions.name: Cmd_InstantSetupTeamWeapon
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to instant setup their team weapon without animation

category_functions.name: Cmd_Garrison
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to load at a random entity or squad of the group
description_extended: overload is a flag that will allow the hold entity to ignore maximum slot check
category_functions.return_type: EntityID or SquadID id of the destination

category_functions.name: Cmd_SquadPath
category_functions.description_short: Send a command to the squad to follow a path. Can wait at each waypoint. The sgroup can be deleted when in proximity of a marker if you pass in the marker as the 7th argument (it assumes a proximity of 5 if you forget to set one on the marker)
description_extended: loop can be: LOOP_NONE, LOOP_NORMAL, LOOP_TOGGLE_DIRECTION

category_functions.name: Cmd_AbandonTeamWeapon
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to abandon their current team weapon if they have it and they could (tuning value in attribute editor)

category_functions.name: Cmd_Stop
category_functions.description_short: Sends a stop command to egroup or sgroup.

category_functions.name: Cmd_SetupTeamWeapon
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to setup their team weapon with animation

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveToThenAttackMove
category_functions.description_short: Move a squad group to a given position, attack-moving once close enough
description_extended: Squad will move to a position, once they're within 'distance', they will attack-move the rest of the way.

category_functions.name: Cmd_InstantUpgrade
category_functions.description_short: Sends an instant upgrade command to a player, egroup or sgroup. accepts a single upgrade or table of upgrades.

category_functions.name: Cmd_StopSquadsExcept
category_functions.description_short: Pass in a group to command to 'stop'. Pass in booleans for capturing and building

category_functions.name: Cmd_RevertOccupiedBuilding
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to revert occupied building

category_functions.name: Cmd_SquadPatrolMarker
category_functions.description_short: Causes a squad to patrol a marker attacking any enemies that come within its radius. If used on circular markers, the radius must be at least 5. To stop the squad from patrolling the marker, use Cmd_Stop.

category_functions.name: Cmd_StaggeredRetreat
category_functions.description_short: Retreats large numbers of units in a staggered, realistic manner.
description_extended: Each Squad in the sgroup will have a 1 in 3 chance to retreat.  After 10 seconds (or maxTries), all squads will be forced to retreat. Squads will delete on arrival at their retreat point.
vulnerableRetreat will make retreating squads take more damage

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveToThenCapture
category_functions.description_short: Command attacker sgroup to attack move to strategic point target; when it is capturable, the sgroup would capture it

category_functions.name: Cmd_AttachSquads
category_functions.description_short: Attach the squad from sgroupnameAttachee to sgroupname.  Both SGroups must contain only one squad.

category_functions.name: Cmd_DetonateDemolitions
category_functions.description_short: Detonates a building's demolitions

category_functions.name: Cmd_InstantReinforceUnit
category_functions.description_short: Sends a instant reinforce command to all squads in a group.  count represents the number of commands to send.
description_extended: Note: This function bypasses pre-reqs, costs and the production queue

category_functions.name: Cmd_Retreat
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to retreat, optionally to a specific location. The sgroup can be deleted when in proximity of a marker (it assumes a proximity of 5 if you forget to set one on the marker)
description_extended: vulnerableRetreat will make retreating squads take more damage

category_functions.name: Cmd_Attack
category_functions.description_short: Issues an attack command to an SGroup

category_functions.name: Cmd_SquadCamouflageStance
category_functions.description_short: Sends an camouflage stance command to all squads in a group.  stanceid should be the number returned by Util_GetCamouflageStanceID( stancename )

category_functions.name: Cmd_EjectOccupants
category_functions.description_short: Orders an EGroup or SGroup to kick out its occupants. If no position is specified, the occupants stay at the exit.

category_functions.name: Cmd_AttackMoveThenCapture
category_functions.description_short: Command attacker sgroup to attack move to strategic point target; when it is capturable, the sgroup would capture it

category_functions.name: Cmd_Move
category_functions.description_short: Move a squad group to a given position.
description_extended: Supports facing, 'offset' movement, and can find cover. The sgroup can be deleted when in proximity of a marker (it assumes a proximity of 5 if you forget to set one on the marker)

category_functions.name: Cmd_AttackMove
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to attack move to a position (anything whose position can be queried). can be queued, can follow a plan, can search for cover within a radius

category_functions.name: Cmd_SetDemolitions
category_functions.description_short: Orders a squad group to place demolition charges on a building (egroup). Function does nothing if egroup cannot be detonated, or player can't afford the demolitions

category_functions.name: Cmd_CaptureTeamWeapon
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to capture team weapon entity group.

category_functions.name: Cmd_RecrewVehicle
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to recrew an abandoned vehicle.

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveAwayFromPos
category_functions.description_short: Move a squad group out of a position to a certain radius
description_extended: All squads in the group will move away from the centre position from its current position

category_functions.name: Cmd_UpgradeRemove
category_functions.description_short: Sends an upgrade remove command to a player, egroup or sgroup. accepts a single upgrade or table of upgrades.

category_functions.name: Cmd_Construct
category_functions.description_short: Orders a squad to contruct a building at specified position, or to continue construction on an existing building.
description_extended: The command also checks to see if a building already exists at the location, and the squad will continue building it, if it is of the correct type.

category_functions.name: Cmd_HoldPosition
category_functions.description_short: Order a squad group to hold position at a given location (or just it's current location)
description_extended: The location parameter can be a position (to hold position at that location), or a Boolean to enable/disable HoldPosition at the current location. If it's omitted entirely, it defaults to true.

category_functions.name: Cmd_Upgrade
category_functions.description_short: Sends an upgrade command to a player, egroup or sgroup. accepts a single upgrade or table of upgrades.

category_functions.name: Cmd_ReinforceUnit
category_functions.description_short: Sends a reinforce command to all squads in a group.  count represents the number of commands to send.
description_extended: Note: To reinforce squad bypassing the pre-reqs and costs use Cmd_InstantReinforceUnit.

category_functions.name: Cmd_UngarrisonSquad
category_functions.description_short: Orders an sgroup to exit the building or vehicle that it's in. If no position is specified, the sgroup stays at the exit.

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveToClosestMarker
category_functions.description_short: Moves a squad group to the closest marker in a list/table of MarkerIDs.

category_functions.name: Cmd_Surrender
category_functions.description_short: Orders a squad to surrender and awards the local player with an appropriate number of action points
description_extended: Use the optional parameter to assign action points to override the default number.  The function automatically addresses squads that are in buildings or vehicles by ordering them out of the vehicle.
The command will also overwrite the exit position as well, if you do not want the squads to exit at the map entry point.

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveToAndDestroy
category_functions.description_short: Moves a squad group to the indicated Marker and destroys it.

category_functions.name: Cmd_MoveToAndDeSpawn
category_functions.description_short: Moves a squad group to the indicated Marker and despawns it.

category_functions.name: Cmd_Ability
category_functions.description_short: Sends an ability command to a player, egroup or sgroup. extra parameters are provided if the ability requires them.

category_functions.name: Ai:GetEncountersBySquad
category_functions.description_short: Finds all encounters that contain ANY or ALL squads within the given sgroup.

category_functions.name: Ai:GetEncountersBySGroup
category_functions.description_short: Finds all encounters that contain ANY or ALL squads within the given sgroup.

category_functions.name: MapIcon_CreateArrow
category_functions.description_short: Creates an arrow on the metamap between the two locations provided

category_functions.name: Affectors_GetTable
category_functions.description_short: Get the table of Mission Affectors
description_extended: Returns the mission_affectors table. The data in this table describes campaign map state and is used to
affect mission setup or mission gameplay. Also available in skirmish missions.
Entries (available in mission and skirmish unless mission only, skirmish only:
entry_point_id: an integer indicating the entry point from which the player is starting the mission (mission only)
player_company_bp_name: name of the blueprint for the company with which the player started the mission
enemy_company_bp_name: name of the blueprint for the company with which the enemy started the mission

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetSquadsHeld
category_functions.description_short: Returns an sgroup containing all squads held by any entities in an egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_EnableMinimapIndicator
category_functions.description_short: Enables or disables the minimap indicator for all entities in a group

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetTeamWeaponDestroyOnAbandonChance
category_functions.description_short: Set chance that team weapons in egroup will self destruct on abandon

category_functions.name: EGroup_HasUpgrade
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether ANY or ALL entities in an EGroup have the specified upgrade

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAnimatorEvent
category_functions.description_short: Set animation event for an EGroup. Please only use this for simple animations

category_functions.name: EGroup_RemoveUpgrade
category_functions.description_short: Removes upgrade(s) from an egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAnimatorVariable
category_functions.description_short: Set animation variable value for an EGroup. Please only use this for simple animations

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetCrushable
category_functions.description_short: Overrides crushable behavior for an egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsHoldingAny
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether any entity in an EGroup has a hold on anything

category_functions.name: EGroup_Kill
category_functions.description_short: Kill all entities in an EGroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_RestoreTargetingType
category_functions.description_short: Restore the targeting type of the entities in this EGroup to their respective defaults (as found in their EBPs)

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsCapturedByTeam
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if all or any strategic points in a group have been captured. Use ANY or ALL.
description_extended: This function will ignore all entities that cannot be captured and will return false if no entities in the group can be captured.

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetAvgHealth
category_functions.description_short: Returns the average health ratio of all units in a entity group.
description_extended: This uses the "proper" measure of health for panel buildings, so should accurately reflect what the user sees.

category_functions.name: EGroup_ReSpawn
category_functions.description_short: Respawn all despawned entities in a group.

category_functions.name: EGroup_CountAlive
category_functions.description_short: Get the number of alive entities (both spawned and despawned)

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsBurning
category_functions.description_short: Checks if ANY or ALL entities in an egroup are on fire (ignition threshold exceeded)

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsEmpty
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if a named entity group contains no spawned or despawned entities

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetRallyPoint
category_functions.description_short: Set the rally point for this entity
description_extended: This is usually set to zero, any higher value prevents the entity from having its health reduced below this given value

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetPlayerOwner
category_functions.description_short: Changes the player owner for all spawned and despawned entities of an EGroup.
description_extended: Strategic/capturable point does not support setting player owner directly

category_functions.name: EGroup_InstantCaptureStrategicPoint
category_functions.description_short: Change the ownership of a Strategic Point

category_functions.name: EGroup_CanSeeEGroup
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities in a group can see ALL or ANY entities in a given egroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_RemoveGroup
category_functions.description_short: Remove from the first SGroup all squads contained in the second SGroup. SGroup2 remains untouched.

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetHealthMinCap
category_functions.description_short: Set the minimum health for this entity
description_extended: This is usually set to zero, any higher value prevents the entity from having its health reduced below this given value

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetRecrewable
category_functions.description_short: Sets all entities in an egroup to be recrewable or not when abandoned

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetStrategicPointNeutral
category_functions.description_short: Sets a strategic point to neutral (not owned by any team)

category_functions.name: EGroup_CanSeeSGroup
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities in a group can see ALL or ANY squads in a given sgroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_CreateTable
category_functions.description_short: Returns a table of egroups NOT in the world builder
description_extended: See Marker_GetTable for more info on format parameter

category_functions.name: EGroup_CreateIfNotFound
category_functions.description_short: Find a entity group from name.  Creates a new one with given name if it doesnt exist.

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetSharedProductionQueue
category_functions.description_short: Enables shared team production on a building (teammates can build using THEIR resources)

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetSpawnedEntityFilter
category_functions.description_short: Get the first spawned entity from egroup that meets the condition (a function that takes an entity)
category_functions.return_type: EntityID or NIL if none met condition

category_functions.name: EGroup_AddAbility
category_functions.description_short: Adds an ability to all entities in an egroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_FilterCamouflaged
category_functions.description_short: Filters an EGroup to either FILTER_REMOVE or FILTER_KEEP entities that are currently camouflaged (stealthed included)

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsMoving
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ANY or ALL entities in an EGroup are moving.

category_functions.name: EGroup_HasBlueprint
category_functions.description_short: Check if ANY or ALL of the entities in a group match the blueprint specified.
description_extended: The blueprint can be a table of blueprints or types (see Entity_HasBlueprint() for details)

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetSelectable
category_functions.description_short: Set player selectable state of entities in the egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_CallEntityFunction
category_functions.description_short: Calls an Entity_ function on every entity in an egroup
description_extended: Example: EGroup_CallEntityFunction( eg_emplacements, Entity_SetAnimatorAction, actionName )
will call Entity_SetAnimatorAction( entity, actionName ) for every entity in eg_emplacements
The first parameter of the supplied function must be EntityID

category_functions.name: EGroup_CallEntityFunctionAllOrAny
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether ALL or ANY entities in an egroup satisfy a condition, using an Entity_ function to perform the query on each entity
description_extended: Example: EGroup_CallEntityFunctionAllOrAny( eg_emplacements, ANY, Misc_IsEntityOnScreen, pct )
will call Misc_IsEntityOnScreen( entity, pct ) to determine whether ANY entity in eg_emplacements is on screen
The first parameter of the supplied function must be EntityID

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAutoTargetting
category_functions.description_short: Sets whether a weapon to auto-target things or not

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetDemolitions
category_functions.description_short: Instantly wires a building for demolitions

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetInvulnerable
category_functions.description_short: Enable/Disable invulnerablity for an entire entity group. Use true and false for simple on/off, or use a number between 0.0 and 1.0 for more precise control on how much damage an entity can take before it takes no more.
description_extended: The optional reset_time is used to automatically remove invulnerability after a set time. If invulnerable, health damage is disabled.

category_functions.name: EGroup_Single
category_functions.description_short: Creates an entity group containing a single entity
description_extended: Creates an EGroup containing just one entity, creating the group if it doesn't exist and clearing it if it does. It returns the name of the EGroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_InstantRevertOccupiedBuilding
category_functions.description_short: Reverts an occupied building

category_functions.name: EGroup_ContainsBlueprints
category_functions.description_short: Check if a group contains ALL or ANY of the blueprints.

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAnimatorAction
category_functions.description_short: Trigger animation action for an EGroup. Please only use this for simple animations

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetLastAttacker
category_functions.description_short: Gets the last attacker(s) for all the entities in an EGroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetSequence
category_functions.description_short: Builds a table of EGroupIDs that are named in a sequence. i.e. a name of "eg_building" will find groups "eg_building1", "eg_building2" and so on, up until it looks for a group that isn't there.

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetWBTable
category_functions.description_short: Returns a table of egroups from the world builder
description_extended: See Marker_GetTable for more info on format parameter

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsProducingSquads
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities in a group are currently producing squads
description_extended: Set all to true to check for ALL or set to false to check for ANY

category_functions.name: EGroup_CreateUnique
category_functions.description_short: Returns an EGroup with a unique name, prefixed by the 'prefix' parameter.

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetWorldOwned
category_functions.description_short: Makes an egroup neutral

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetTargetingType
category_functions.description_short: Set the allowable methods of targeting the entities in this EGroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_CompleteUpgrade
category_functions.description_short: Instantly adds an upgrade to all entities in a given EGroup.

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsCapturedByPlayer
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if all or any strategic points in a group have been captured. Use ANY or ALL.
description_extended: This function will ignore all entities that cannot be captured and will return false if no entities in the group can be captured.

category_functions.name: EGroup_FilterUnderConstruction
category_functions.description_short: Filters an EGroup by construction status. Set the filtertype to FILTER_REMOVE to remove buildings under construction.
description_extended: Setting filtertype to FILTER_KEEP results in the group only containing those entities that are in the process of being built.

category_functions.name: EGroup_EnableUIDecorator
category_functions.description_short: Enable or disable decorators on all entities in the egroup. Sets selection visuals as well unless enableSelection is specified.

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAnimatorState
category_functions.description_short: Set animation state of a state machine for an EGroup. Please only use this for simple animations

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsUsingAbility
category_functions.description_short: Checks if ANY or ALL squads within an EGroup are using an ability
description_extended: also used for emplacements/entities that are built but function through the use of squads.  Does not check WHAT ability a squad is using.

category_functions.name: EGroup_CountBlueprints
category_functions.description_short: Returns the total count of all entities in a given EGroup with the provided blueprint

category_functions.name: EGroup_Duplicate
category_functions.description_short: Duplicates an EGroup. Creates a copy of egroup1 in egroup2. The function will clear egroup2 beforehand if necessary.

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsOnScreen
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ANY or ALL (use those keywords) of the entities in the group are present onscreen. You can pass in a percentage of the screen to check, so 0.8 would be a centered rectangle occupying 80% of the screen.

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsInCover
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities are in cover.

category_functions.name: EGroup_CreateKickerMessage
category_functions.description_short: Create and display kicker message on the each entity in the egroup to the player

category_functions.name: EGroup_ContainsEGroup
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if EGroup1 contains ANY or ALL of EGroup2

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetTotalHealth
category_functions.description_short: Returns the total health of all units in a entity group.
description_extended: This uses the "proper" measure of health for panel buildings, so should accurately reflect what the user sees.

category_functions.name: EGroup_DeSpawn
category_functions.description_short: Despawn all spawned entities in a group.

category_functions.name: EGroup_FilterOnScreen
category_functions.description_short: Filters an EGroup by whether units are on screen or not. Percent refers to the screen area you are considering (0.8 is a good value to use - it won't include things that are right at the screen edge).
description_extended: Setting filtertype to FILTER_KEEP results in the group only containing those entities that are on screen.

category_functions.name: EGroup_DestroyAllEntities
category_functions.description_short: Destroys all spawned and despawned entities in a group.
description_extended: Be careful not to confuse this with EGroup_Destroy which destroys the group and NOT the items it contains.  This function will destroy
spawned and despawned items in a group

category_functions.name: EGroup_NotifyOnPlayerDemolition
category_functions.description_short: Calls a function when any entity in an EGroup gets destroyed by the player clicking the "Detonate me" button

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsSpawned
category_functions.description_short: Checks if ANY or ALL entities in an group are currently spawned or not.

category_functions.name: EGroup_Hide
category_functions.description_short: Hide or show all entities in an EGroup
description_extended: Bool should be true to hide, false to show

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsUnderAttackByPlayer
category_functions.description_short: Check if the entities are attacked by the player

category_functions.name: EGroup_WarpToPos
category_functions.description_short: Warps all members of an EGroup immediately to a new position

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsUnderAttack
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities are under attack within the time

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetBurnExtEnabled
category_functions.description_short: Enables or disables the burn extenstion

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetInvulnerable
category_functions.description_short: Check invulnerablity state for ALL or ANY entity in an entity group.
description_extended: Set all param to true to check for ALL or set to false to check for ANY.

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetRandomSpawnedEntity
category_functions.description_short: Get a random spawned entity from egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_SetAvgHealth
category_functions.description_short: Sets the health of each unit in an entity group to a given percent [0.0, 1.0].

category_functions.name: EGroup_HasAbility
category_functions.description_short: Test whether ANY or ALL buildings in a group have a specified ability

category_functions.name: EGroup_WarpToMarker
category_functions.description_short: Warps all members of an EGroup immediately to a marker

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsDoingAttack
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities are attacking within the time

category_functions.name: EGroup_RemoveDemolitions
category_functions.description_short: Removes all demolition charges on an egroup

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetOffsetPosition
category_functions.description_short: Returns a position (a certain distance away) relative to an entity's current position/orientation. see ScarUtil.scar for explanation of 'offset' parameter

category_functions.name: EGroup_GetSpread
category_functions.description_short: Returns the distance from the centre of the group of the entity that furthest out.

category_functions.name: EGroup_IsUnderAttackFromDirection
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ALL or ANY entities are under attack from a direction within the time. see ScarUtil.scar for types of directions. you can pass in a table of offsets

category_functions.name: EGroup_Filter
category_functions.description_short: Filters an EGroup by blueprint or type.
description_extended: Blueprints can be provided by name or by ID, and in a table if you want to filter on more than one type.
Setting filtertype to FILTER_KEEP results in the group only containing entities of the types listed in the blueprint table.
Setting filtertype to FILTER_REMOVE will strip those same entities out and leave those that aren't of the types listed.

category_functions.name: EGroup_ContainsEntity
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if EGroup contains a particular EntityID

category_functions.name: Timer_Add
category_functions.description_short: Add the amount of time to the specified timer

category_functions.name: Timer_DisplayOnScreen
category_functions.description_short: Displays a timer on the screen - You need to call this regularly (i.e. every second) to update the onscreen display. THIS IS A TEMPORARY FUNCTION - WELL GET PROPER UI SUPPORT LATER ON

category_functions.name: Timer_Resume
category_functions.description_short: Resume the specified timer.
description_extended: Pause and Resume calls are ref-counted: if you have called Pause *twice* on a timer, you will also need to call Resume twice in order to start the timer up again. Set the force parameter to true if you want to bypass the refcounting and make sure a timer starts up again.

category_functions.name: Timer_End
category_functions.description_short: Stop the specified timer.

category_functions.name: Timer_Display
category_functions.description_short: Display (in the console) the amount of time remaining in the specified timer.

category_functions.name: Timer_GetRemaining
category_functions.description_short: Get the remaining time for the specified timer.

category_functions.name: Timer_GetMinutesAndSeconds
category_functions.description_short: Returns TWO values: minutes and seconds. Provide it a function like Timer_GetRemaining or Timer_GetElapsed

category_functions.name: Timer_Pause
category_functions.description_short: Pause the specified timer.
description_extended: Pause and Resume calls are ref-counted: if you have called Pause *twice* on a timer, you will also need to call Resume twice in order to start the timer up again.

category_functions.name: Timer_Start
category_functions.description_short: Start a timer with the specified id, taking the required period ( in seconds )

category_functions.name: Timer_Exists
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether the timer with this ID exists

category_functions.name: Timer_Advance
category_functions.description_short: Advances the timer by the specified amount of time

category_functions.name: Timer_IsPaused
category_functions.description_short: Check if the timer is paused.

category_functions.name: Timer_GetElapsed
category_functions.description_short: Returns how much time has elapsed since this timer has been started

category_functions.name: Util_GetRelativeOffset
category_functions.description_short: Returns a relative offset position to an element

category_functions.name: Util_ScarPos
category_functions.description_short: Converts a 2D top down position to a 3D ScarPosition. returns Position, if y-height is nil, y-height = ground height, terrain ground or walkable
description_extended: 3D ScarPositions have the x axis left to right, the z axis in to out, and the y axis down to up (y axis represents the height of the terrain).  Use this function to convert a top-down 2D position to a 3D world position.\n\n
Note: (0,0) is in the center of the map.

category_functions.name: Util_SetPlayerCanSkipSequence
category_functions.description_short: Sets it so that a player can skip a scripted sequence. When the skip key is pressed, calls back the given function as a post-sequence setup. noFadeIn stops the system from fading back into gameplay when finished. Call Util_SetPlayerUnableToSkipSequence() when the sequence is finished to disable

category_functions.name: Util_GetDistanceSquared
category_functions.description_short: Returns the _squared_ distance between two objects
description_extended: This is much cheaper to calculate that Util_GetDistance(), and fine for when you're only comparing results against other squared distances (i.e. to find the closest item)

category_functions.name: Util_ElementCanSee
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if a Player/Team can see any or all of an SGroup/Squad/EGroup/Entity/Position/Marker

category_functions.name: Util_FindHiddenSpawn
category_functions.description_short: Following a path from origin to destination, finds the HS_CLOSEST/HS_FURTHEST hidden position to/from the destination
description_extended: If no position is found, returns origin

category_functions.name: Util_SetPlayerOwner
category_functions.description_short: Sets the player owner for an entity, squad, egroup or sgroup. Also sets player owner of whatever is garrisoned inside them

category_functions.name: Util_NormalMode
category_functions.description_short: Enters Normal mode

category_functions.name: Util_GetPositionFromAtoB
category_functions.description_short: Returns a position that is distance metres from point A, headed in the direction of point B.
description_extended: You can also pass in a percentage (0.0 to 1.0) instead of a distance in metres.

category_functions.name: Util_StartIntel
category_functions.description_short: Play an Intel Event. These are medium priority, and will interrupt a ambient, but not an NIS.
description_extended: This function should used instead of Event_Start because it handles priorities.

category_functions.name: Util_HidePlayerForNIS
category_functions.description_short: Hides all of a player's squads and/or buildings
description_extended: Doesn't hide buildings a player is in, or any base structures. Only items like sandbags, tanktraps, mg nests, etc. Put multiple playerIDs in a table to hide many players together, or use ALL for the playerID to apply to all players at once.

category_functions.name: Util_StartNIS
category_functions.description_short: Plays an NIS. The NIS should have a call to NIS_START(details) at the beginning, and NIS_END() at the end.
description_extended: Example details table keys: {style = NIS_OPENING, NIS_MID or NIS_CLOSING, exemptions = {sg_unit_to_not_despawn}, revealFOW = true, callbackStart = func, callbackEnd = func}

category_functions.name: Util_EntityLimit
category_functions.description_short: Checks the entity count for the world and returns true or false depending on the result. A specific value can be passed in to override the default amount.

category_functions.name: Util_FullscreenMode
category_functions.description_short: Enters Fullscreen mode

parameters.arg_name: VisibilityFlag Enums] hiddenGameComponentFlags: List of GameUICore VisibilityFlag enums to hide in fullscreen mode. Pass

category_functions.name: Util_GetAngleDifference
category_functions.description_short: Returns the angle (in degrees) between two items
description_extended: The items must of of types that can have a direction resolved on them with Util_GetDirection()

category_functions.name: Util_NewHUDFeatureEvent
category_functions.description_short: Calls UI_NewHUDFeature() as an IntelEvent. Will get queued as any other event. See UI_NewHUDFeature() for parameter details.

category_functions.name: Util_StringSplit
category_functions.description_short: Splits a string into a table of substrings based on a given separator.

category_functions.name: Util_AutoSave
category_functions.description_short: Automatically save the game for the player. The savegame name is built using the abbreviated mission name + checkpoint. You can optionally have it wait until the player is out of combat.
description_extended: This function checks the user setting regarding autosaves (so you don't have to!), and does nothing if the player has them disabled.

category_functions.name: Util_LogSyncWpn
category_functions.description_short: Tracks a syncweapon ID and destroys it (by default) or makes it uncapturable (if kill is set to false)

category_functions.name: Util_PrintObject
category_functions.description_short: Prints out the entire contents of an Object
description_extended: This is most useful when used in conjunction with fatal() or bug() to populate the log file.
Objects can be anything (Player, SGroup, Int, Table, String, etc.), but this is most useful for Tables

category_functions.name: Util_GetFacingFromDirection
category_functions.description_short: Converts a direction into a facing.
category_functions.return_type: Facing position is 10m in the direciton.

category_functions.name: Util_GetRandomHiddenPosition
category_functions.description_short: Finds a hidden position based on what the local player can and can't see
description_extended: If no position is found, returns nil

category_functions.name: Util_GetDistance
category_functions.description_short: Returns the distance between two objects

category_functions.name: Util_GetDirectionFromAtoB
category_functions.description_short: Returns the direction heading from point a towards point b

category_functions.name: Util_Grab
category_functions.description_short: Grabs the selected squads/entities and returns them in a group. Only works with -dev.
description_extended: Tries to return an SGroup first. If it's empty, it will return an EGroup. (Both types can't be selected at the same time)

category_functions.name: Util_ForceRetreatAll
category_functions.description_short: Forces all squads given to retreat, regardless of whether they are on team weapons or not. Disables aiEncounters input (true disables all encounters).

category_functions.name: Util_AutoAmbient
category_functions.description_short: Auto-generate an Ambient Event. These are Low priority, and will hopefully interrupt nothing.
description_extended: Takes a table of Actors and LOC numbers

category_functions.name: Util_GetEntitiesByBP
category_functions.description_short: Find all the entities with a given blueprint in sourcegroup and add them to destgroup.
description_extended: See also: EGroup_Filter()

category_functions.name: Util_TriggerEvent
category_functions.description_short: Library function to trigger NIS event under a certain sets of conditions.  NOTE: if checking against a marker DO NOT specify a range.  The range of the marker set in the WorldBuilder will be used.
description_extended: triggering event when one of the player's squads come near a particular SGroup, EGroup, Marker, or Position and that squad is onscreen, and that squad is not in combat.
6 arguments when using marker, 7 arguments when using position, egroup and sgroup with the additional range value
non_combat set to TRUE means the squad cannot be in combat if the event is to be triggered.
onscreen_only set to TRUE means the squad must be onscreen if the event is to be triggered.

category_functions.name: Util_GetRelationship
category_functions.description_short: Gets the relationship between two of: entity, squad, egroup, sgroup, player. for groups, the first item is used. returns R_ENEMY, R_ALLY, R_NEUTRAL, R_UNDEFINED, or nil (if world owned or invalid parameters)

category_functions.name: Util_IsSequenceSkipped
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether the currently running sequence has been skipped

category_functions.name: Util_MissionTitle
category_functions.description_short: Play the mission title fade.

category_functions.name: Util_FallBackToGarrisonBuilding
category_functions.description_short: Try to garrison a loadable building within radius that is closer to the first squad of the sgroup than enemy
description_extended: Returns the entity id of the building that the squad try to garrison into. Return nil if nothing is found
The squad suppression would be resetted before fallling back so that they would not succumb to pinned state

category_functions.name: Util_ToggleAllowIntelEvents
category_functions.description_short: Debug function used to toggle whether or not IntelEvents are played. Only works with -dev parameter

category_functions.name: Util_AutoIntel
category_functions.description_short: Auto-generate an Intel Event. These are medium priority, and will interrupt ambient, but not an NIS.
description_extended: Takes a table of parameters defining speaker(s) and line(s)

category_functions.name: Util_GetDirection
category_functions.description_short: Returns the heading of an item.

category_functions.name: Util_SetPlayerUnableToSkipSequence
category_functions.description_short: Disables Util_SetPlayerCanSkipSequence

category_functions.name: Util_GetMouseoverSGroup
category_functions.description_short: Returns a unique SGroup used to hold mouseover squads obtained from Util_AddMouseoverSquadToSGroup

category_functions.name: Util_CreateEntities
category_functions.description_short: Creates a given number of entities at a location and adds them to an egroup. A PlayerID of nil will create the entities as world objects.
description_extended: The skipForceConstruct parameter allows you to skip the step that normally spawns buildings fully constructed, so you can spawn buildings that self-construct.
The toward parameter should be a world location that the entity should look at, NOT a direction. Leave it blank if
you want the location's orientation to be used for a direction (assuming location is a marker).
The useMarkerTransform parameter, if no toward is passed in, will determine if the marker's transform should be
used for the entity OR if the marker's direction should be used in which case the entity will face the same way as the marker.

category_functions.name: Util_StartNislet
category_functions.description_short: Play Nislet Event. Starts a Nislet event, and calls back a function for post-nislet setup if the Nislet is skipped. noFadeIn stops the system from fading back into gameplay when the player skips

category_functions.name: Util_GetClosestMarker
category_functions.description_short: Returns the closest MarkerID to the entity/marker/pos/egroup/sgroup/squad from the table of markers provided

category_functions.name: Util_GetHealth
category_functions.description_short: Determines the health percentage of a given object
description_extended: Returns average health if the object is a group

category_functions.name: Util_ApplyModifier
category_functions.description_short: Applies any modifier to the target SGroup, EGroup, or Player
description_extended: Valid applytypes are MAT_...(Entity, Squad etc.), if left default assumption is default type for the target
Cases you want to define applytype: Weapon Modifiers, Enable Modifiers, or a player modifier for all entity or squad types
Valid mathtypes are MUT...(Addition, Multiplication, etc.)
Exclusive modifiers will replace all pre-existing modifiers of that modifier type on the target

category_functions.name: Util_GetTrailingNumber
category_functions.description_short: Returns trailing numbers from a string, if it exists, nil otherwise. E.G. "marker23" would return 23.

category_functions.name: Util_PrintTable
category_functions.description_short: Simply prints out everything in a table including nested tables

category_functions.name: Util_IsCinematicMode
category_functions.description_short: Returns whether cinematic mode is active

category_functions.name: Util_StartQuickIntel
category_functions.description_short: Play a quick, one-line Intel event.  These are medium priority, and will interrupt ambient, but not an NIS.
description_extended: Use this when playing a single line.  For multi-line events, use Util_StartIntel

category_functions.name: Util_SortPositionsByClosest
category_functions.description_short: Returns a table of positions sorted from closest to furthest (or furthes to closest if reverse is true) from the origin

category_functions.name: Util_PlayMusic
category_functions.description_short: Plays music from the Data:Sound folder, and stores the music track so it can be resumed after a save/load
description_extended: The new music will phase out the old one. There can only be one music playing at anytime.

category_functions.name: Util_GarrisonNearbyBuilding
category_functions.description_short: Finds a nearby building to garrison. can ignore occupied [friendly] buildings. return ID of entity it found, or nil if not found
description_extended: Can also filter out groups not to occupy

category_functions.name: Util_RestoreMusic
category_functions.description_short: Resumes playing the music track that was last triggered i.e. after a save/load

category_functions.name: Util_UnitCounts
category_functions.description_short: Returns a table containing either the total or a specific player's squad count, entity count, and vehicle count.
description_extended: table can be accessed as scene below
Get Player Example:\n
local t = Util_UnitCounts(player1)\n
print(t.squad)\n
print(t.entity)\n
print(t.vehicle)\n
Get World Example:\n
local t = Util_UnitCounts(true)\n
print(t.squad)\n
print(t.entity)\n
print(t.vehicle)\n
Alternate Format:\n
print(Util_UnitCounts(true).squad)\n

category_functions.name: Util_DespawnAll
category_functions.description_short: ReSpawns or DeSpawns sgroups (and egroups) for all players or the indicated player.
description_extended: examples: Util_DespawnAll(true, true, false) or Util_DespawnAll(true, 1, false) or Util_DespawnAll(false, true, false)

category_functions.name: Util_ExitCinematicMode
category_functions.description_short: Exits Cinematic mode

category_functions.name: Util_MarkerFX
category_functions.description_short: Play an events file at a given markers location

category_functions.name: Util_FindHiddenItem
category_functions.description_short: Finds a hidden position based on what the local player can and can't see
description_extended: If no position is found, returns nil

category_functions.name: Util_DifVar
category_functions.description_short: Takes in a table and chooses the right variable for the difficulty setting. 1-4 elements. Acquires current difficulty by default.

category_functions.name: Util_AddMouseoverSquadToSGroup
category_functions.description_short: If there's a squad under the mouse cursor, this adds it to a unique SGroup. Return value is the SGroup it was added to, or nil if there was no squad under the mouse cursor. Pass in true for 'clearGroup' to clear the sgroup before adding the squad.

category_functions.name: Util_StartAmbient
category_functions.description_short: Play a Speech Ambient. These are the lowest priority, and will be bumped by Intel Events or NIS's.
description_extended: This function should used instead of Event_Start because it handles priorities.

category_functions.name: Util_GetPlayerOwner
category_functions.description_short: Returns the player owner for any of: entity, squad, egroup, sgroup, player. for groups, the first item is used. Returns nil for world owned or empty groups

category_functions.name: Util_TableContains
category_functions.description_short: Checks the first layer of a table and looks for a specified Object, returns true if found.
description_extended: Objects can be anything (Player, SGroup, Int, Table, String, etc.)

category_functions.name: Util_IsAlive
category_functions.description_short: Determines the object is alive
description_extended: Returns true if object is alive

category_functions.name: Util_GetSquadsByBP
category_functions.description_short: Find all the squads with a given blueprint in sourcegroup and add them to destgroup.
description_extended: See also: SGroup_Filter()

category_functions.name: Util_ClearWrecksFromMarker
category_functions.description_short: Clears vehicle wrecks from a given area.
description_extended: Area can be a marker (with or without a range override), a position and range combo, or a territory sector ID. Uses EBP.WRECKED_VEHICLES unless wrecksList is defined.

category_functions.name: Util_FindVisibleSpawn
category_functions.description_short: Following a path from origin to destination, finds the HS_CLOSEST/HS_FURTHEST visible position to/from the destination
description_extended: If no position is found, returns destination

category_functions.name: Util_GetPosition
category_functions.description_short: Returns a position from entity/marker/pos/egroup/sgroup/squad

category_functions.name: Util_DotProductRadians
category_functions.description_short: Returns the result of the dot product of two items in radians
description_extended: The params must be 3D vectors

category_functions.name: Util_HasPosition
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if given entity/marker/pos/egroup/sgroup/squad has a position; if false, Util_GetPosition will fail.

category_functions.name: Util_GarrisonNearbyVehicle
category_functions.description_short: Finds a nearby vehicle to garrison. can ignore occupied [friendly] vehicles. return ID of vehicle it found, or nil if not found,
description_extended: Can also filter out groups not to occupy

category_functions.name: Util_GetPositionAwayFromPlayer
category_functions.description_short: Returns a random position within an area that is not near a player
description_extended: Useful for dropping artillery NEAR a player, but not on him, for example.
searchRadius is the area to look for the location in.  Distance is how far from the player's units the position must be.

category_functions.name: Util_PlayMovie
category_functions.description_short: Play a movie.
description_extended: Plays a movie file after fading out the screen. Fades back in and triggers onComplete once it ends. If fadeIn < 0, does not face back in once complete.
If onCompleteAfterMovie is true, the onComplete function will play as soon as the movie is over, instead of after the fade-in

category_functions.name: Util_ReloadScript
category_functions.description_short: Reloads the running scar script. Current running rules would also be updated to the redefined functioin.

category_functions.name: Util_GetOffsetPosition
category_functions.description_short: Returns a position relative to a entity/squad/egroup/sgroup/marker/position's current position and orientation.

category_functions.name: Util_Kill
category_functions.description_short: Kills a given object

category_functions.name: Util_GetCommandLineArgument
category_functions.description_short: Wrapper function for command line arguments. DO NOT USE MORE THAN ONCE PER ARGUMENT.
category_functions.return_type: NIL, if the command line argument is not set

parameters.arg_name: key of the argument you want to query

category_functions.name: Util_EnterCinematicMode
category_functions.description_short: Enters Cinematic mode

parameters.arg_name: VisibilityFlag Enums] hiddenGameComponentFlags: List of GameUICore VisibilityFlag enums to hide in cinematic mode. Pass
skipNISCallback (optional): Skip NIS callback to set.

category_functions.name: Util_Comparison
category_functions.description_short: Helper function to process comparisons that use the Comparison enum... i.e. return true if value1 IS_LESS_THAN value2
description_extended: Comparison type can be IS_EQUAL, IS_LESS_THAN, IS_LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL, IS_GREATER_THAN, IS_GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL or IS_NOT_EQUAL

category_functions.name: Util_GetRandomPosition
category_functions.description_short: Returns a random position either within the marker's proximity or with a pos and range provided. Range is ignored for rectangular markers

category_functions.name: Util_GetCompareRandomNumberGenerated
category_functions.description_short: Returns if the random number generated succeeds the comparison with the supplied value

category_functions.name: playbill_IsActive
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if the id is valid and the playbill is running

category_functions.name: playbill_Trigger
category_functions.description_short: Spawn the encounter in this instance (i.e. if it was set to trigger manually) or, if it's already spawned and is waiting for it's goal to trigger, triggers that instead.

category_functions.name: playbill_Stop
category_functions.description_short: Stop the playbill associated with this instance

category_functions.name: Misc_SelectSGroup
category_functions.description_short: Select (or deselect) all the squads in an SGroup

category_functions.name: Misc_IsEGroupSelected
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ANY or ALL of the EGroup is selected

category_functions.name: Misc_SetSGroupSelectable
category_functions.description_short: Allow all squads in an SGroup to be selectable (or not)

category_functions.name: Misc_IsSGroupSelected
category_functions.description_short: Returns true if ANY or ALL of the SGroup is selected

category_functions.name: Misc_IsEGroupOnScreen
category_functions.description_short: Test whether ANY or ALL of an EGroup is on screen currently (not strict)

category_functions.name: Misc_SetEGroupSelectable
category_functions.description_short: Allow all entities in an EGroup to be selectable (or not)

category_functions.name: Misc_IsSGroupOnScreen
category_functions.description_short: Test whether ANY or ALL of an SGroup is on screen currently (not strict)

category_functions.name: Misc_SelectEGroup
category_functions.description_short: Select all the entities in an EGroup

category_functions.name: missionobjectives_Trigger
category_functions.description_short: Spawn the encounter in this instance (i.e. if it was set to trigger manually) or, if it's already spawned and is waiting for it's goal to trigger, triggers that instead.

category_functions.name: BP_GetUpgradeBlueprintsWithType
category_functions.description_short: Get a table of all of the Upgrade BPs that match a particular UpgradeType. You can pass in a table of multiple UpgradeTypes to get a list Upgrade BPs that match ANY of the types listed.
description_extended: If you want a blueprint to match a bunch of UpgradeTypes at the same time (i.e. AND instead of OR) then those types should be listed together in a sub-table. This function can potentially be quite slow as it has to parse every Upgrade BP in the game, so be careful about how you use it.

category_functions.name: BP_GetEntityBlueprintsWithType
category_functions.description_short: Get a table of all of the EBPs that match a particular EntityType. You can pass in a table of multiple EntityTypes to get a list EBPs that match ANY of the types listed.
description_extended: If you want a blueprint to match a bunch of EntityTypes at the same time (i.e. AND instead of OR) then those types should be listed together in a sub-table. This function can potentially be quite slow as it has to parse every EBP in the game, so be careful about how you use it.

category_functions.name: BP_GetSquadBlueprintsWithType
category_functions.description_short: Get a table of all of the SBPs that match a particular SquadType. You can pass in a table of multiple SquadTypes to get a list SBPs that match ANY of the types listed.
description_extended: If you want a blueprint to match a bunch of SquadTypes at the same time (i.e. AND instead of OR) then those types should be listed together in a sub-table. This function can potentially be quite slow as it has to parse every SBP in the game, so be careful about how you use it.

category_functions.name: HintMouseover_Add
category_functions.description_short: Adds a Hint Point that will only appear on Mouseover of the target.

category_functions.name: HintMouseover_Remove
category_functions.description_short: Removes a Mouseover Hint Point from the managing function.

category_functions.name: Actor_PlaySpeech
category_functions.description_short: Plays a speech event for a given actor WITH a portrait and subtitle
description_extended: If the speech file is not available, a placeholder time will be calculated for the message using the number of words and the message will be displayed for that length of time.\n
speechbubble: Who a speech bubble should appear over ingame. Can be a squadID or an SGroup (where it appears over the first guy in the group) \n

It can also be a table in the format {sgroup = sg_orkboys, closest_to = sg_gorgutz} where it finds the squad in the group closest to the reference point. It can also be in the format {sbp = SBP.ORKS.ORK_BOY, closest_to = mkr_orkIdol} to find the closest unit of the specified type, and you can also add a player entry to that table to specify which player (default is the local player)\n
You can also specify just an SBP, in which case it will play on the first SBP found owned - use this for elite units who may or may not be on the map

audioCtrlEvent:  is a wwise event name. This parameter is used to apply an effect on the line of speech. Ex. "Comm_on" plays speech through a comm effect. Work with an audio designer to get more effects.

category_functions.name: Actor_PlaySpeechWithoutPortrait
category_functions.description_short: Plays a speech event for a given actor WITHOUT a portrait or subtitle. See Actor_PlaySpeech for more details

category_functions.name: GameModifiers.Modify_Enable_ParadropReinforcements
category_functions.description_short: Allows paratroopers to reinforce from the sky.  Set to true to enable, false to disable.

category_functions.name: MissionOMatic_TriggerObjectiveStageCallbackData
category_functions.description_short: Triggers the callback actions stored in the given objective stage callback table. Expect the format to match
description_extended: Fills outPlaybillIDs with spawned playbillIDs if it is passed in.

category_functions.name: locationgroup_AddLocationTagCheckbox
category_functions.description_short: Adds location_tag_<LOCATION TAG NAME> entries to the parentSchema which are booleans that can be checked on or off.
description_extended: Each tag_type will have its own boolean field added to the schema. Requirement can be nil, otherwise it will be added
as the requirement for the checkbox.

category_functions.name: locationgroup_ForEachCheckedTag
category_functions.description_short: Runs the function for each tag that is checked in checkbox_data, with the tag as the argument.

category_functions.name: Context_CollectContextLists
category_functions.description_short: Collects a list of ContextLists to pick a context from based on the provided context selection info
category_functions.return_type: Table (Array with each element using the ContextList format)

parameters.arg_name: context_selection_info (format specified in the prefab schema)

category_functions.name: Context_CreateContextFromTarget
category_functions.description_short: Create a context table format from a given target for use as a playbill context

parameters.arg_name: nil (nil will be returned in that case)

category_functions.name: Context_SelectContext
category_functions.description_short: Attempts to select a context from the global context lists according to the provided context_selection_info.
category_functions.return_type: nil or Table with the Context format (see context_selection.scar)

category_functions.name: Context_ExtractTargetFromContext
category_functions.description_short: Get the Entity/Squad/Position of the context provided (expects Context table format)

parameters.arg_name: context with the Context format (see context_selection.scar)

category_functions.name: Context_ExtractInfoFromContext
category_functions.description_short: Get the position, direction, and proximity of the context provided (expects Context table format)
description_extended: Will return nil for any data that is not found on the context. For example, entities do not have a proximity.
category_functions.return_type: ST_SCARPOS position, ST_SCARPOS direction, Number proximity

parameters.arg_name: context with the Context format (see context_selection.scar)

category_functions.name: HintPoint_SetDisplayOffset
category_functions.description_short: Sets a hintpoint's display offset, which is 3D for world hintpoints and 2D for taskbar binding hintpoints (ignore z)

category_functions.name: HintPoint_Remove
category_functions.description_short: Removes a hintpoint.

category_functions.name: HintPoint_Add
category_functions.description_short: Creates a hintpoint attached to a Marker, EGroup, SGroup or position
description_extended: If range is set to 0, then the hintpoint is rangeless, see the design document for rangeless features.
The following types of hintpoint actions are available.
HPAT_Objective
HPAT_Hint
HPAT_Critical
HPAT_Movement
HPAT_Attack
HPAT_FormationSetup
HPAT_RallyPoint
HPAT_DeepSnow
HPAT_CoverGreen
HPAT_CoverYellow
HPAT_CoverRed
HPAT_Detonation
HPAT_Vaulting

category_functions.name: HintPoint_SetVisible
category_functions.description_short: Sets a hintpoint's visibility. Currently, FOW is not accounted for.

category_functions.name: AIBaseGoal_SetModifyGoalData
category_functions.description_short: Set modify goal data.  modifyGoalData is cloned; values specified via keyname_Multiplier are used for the numeric keyname encounter goal value.

category_functions.name: AIBaseGoal_AdjustDefaultGoalData
category_functions.description_short: Adjust default goal data.  Sets the default GoalData to the current defaults plus additionalDefaultGoalData; any values specified are used for unspecified encounter goal values.

category_functions.name: AIBaseGoal_SetDefaultGoalData
category_functions.description_short: Set default goal data.  defaultGoalData is cloned; any values specified are used for unspecified encounter goal values.

category_functions.name: AIBaseGoal_SetOverrideGoalData
category_functions.description_short: Set override goal data.  overrideGoalData is cloned; any values specified are used for encounter goal values.

category_functions.name: PartialSave_ShouldPerformPartialSave
category_functions.description_short: Determines whether or not this game should be using the partial SCAR save/load flow

category_functions.name: PartialSave_AddSaveFunction
category_functions.description_short: Adds the specified function as a step that will be called during save.
description_extended: The function will be passed the save table to edit as the first argument.

category_functions.name: PartialSave_AddRestoreFunction
category_functions.description_short: Adds the specified function as a step that will be called during restore.
description_extended: The function will be passed the save table to read from as the first argument.

category_functions.name: Formation_PlaceSquadGroupsInFormation
category_functions.description_short: Place an SGroup or table of SGroups in formation
